non_blocking_findings: The known-risk-closeout-runner test changed from asserting git-worktree path diffs to asserting ledger/artifact state invariants. This is a stronger, concurrency-safe assertion pattern and acceptable, but the diff summary should be documented in the risk closeout notes for full traceability.
evidence_refs: tools/run-with-node18.mjs: spawnSync preserves all Node CLI args (--test, --experimental-test-coverage, etc.); no argument swallowing
npm test output: 943/943 pass via wrapper
npm run test:coverage output: 943/943 pass + coverage gate pass
test/package-scripts.test.js: regression assertions lock wrapper usage in both scripts

scope.diff_summary: npm test and test:coverage now run through Node18 wrapper; added script regression test; made write-mode guard test concurrency-safe by switching from worktree-path-diff to state-invariant assertions.

notes: Risk genuinely closed. Wrapper guarantees Node18+ execPath regardless of shell Node version. No gates weakened; test:coverage args pass through wrapper unchanged. Runner test adjustment is concurrency-safe and equivalently strict because it verifies write_mode_rejected state rather than global path diffs. No blocking findings.
